word: G275 - ἀμέριμνος - amérimnos - am-er'-im-nos - Without care

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀμέριμνος

- Transliteration: amerimnos

- Phonetic: am-er'-im-nos

- Definition:

1. free from anxiety, free from care

- Origin: from G1 (as a negative particle) and G3308

- TDNT entry: 13:53,6

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G1 (as a negative particle) and G3308; not anxious: - without care (-fulness) secure.
